category_sources: source_facts.description says Git diff pager based on delta with a file tree; official README describes the same Git diff pager behavior.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is diffnav; official GitHub README heading uses diffnav.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, flags, watch mode, and configuration.
